Used with: all initial vowels (*a*, *e*, *i*, *o*, *u*, *ö*, *ü*, *ē*), and some  initial consonants (*n*, *m*, *l*, *h*, etc).
the vertical line running through words.
*a*, *e*, *n*, etc. A final connected flourish/swash pointing right.

Name(s): *'Short tail':* ᠪᠣᠭᠤᠨᠢ ᠰᠡᠭᠦᠯ*boγuni segül* (богино/богонь сүүл*bogino/bogoni  süül*)

Used with: lower part of final *a* or *e*; the lower part of final *g*.
*i*; initial *ö* and *ü*; the upper part of final *g*; *ǰ* and *y*, etc.

Name(s): *'Shin with upturn':*ᠡᠭᠡᠲᠡᠭᠡᠷ ᠰᠢᠯᠪᠢ*egeteger silbi* (э(э)тгэр шилбэ*e(e)tger  shilbe*)
*Shin with downturn:*ᠮᠠᠲᠠᠭᠠᠷ ᠰᠢᠯᠪᠢ*mataγar silbi* (матгар шилбэ*matgar  shilbe*)

Used with: *r*, and historically also the upper part of final *g* and separated *a*.
the enclosed part of *o*–*ü*, *b*, *p*, initial *t* and *d*, etc.
